name: frontend-taste-engineer
description: Context-adaptive frontend generation plus safely gated external source discovery, planning, building, auditing, refinement, privacy review, and production verification.

interface.shortDescription: Turn tiny prompts into complete production frontends
interface.longDescription: A source-backed frontend operating system that expands short website and redesign prompts into complete, context-appropriate, distinctive, responsive, accessible, screenshot-refined implementations. A safely gated 395-source catalog supports bounded component/template/inspiration discovery without copying unclear-license material or treating agent tools as design authority.
defaultPrompt: Make a website for this idea.
Design and build a distinctive, production-ready landing page for this product.
Audit this frontend and fix its highest-impact usability and design problems.
Rebuild this screenshot responsively while preserving accessibility.
